blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,460 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
